scripts.build-e: rm -rf build-e && mkdir build-e && parcel build --dist-dir build-e src/index-e.html --no-source-maps && cp -r ./public/* ./build-e
scripts.build-w: rm -rf build-w && mkdir build-w && parcel build --dist-dir build-w src/index-w.html --no-source-maps && cp -r ./public/* ./build-w
scripts.deploy-e: yarn clear && yarn build-e && scp -r ./build-e/* vds-amster:/var/www/ekza/html
